'''Dindoo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]].

A poor entrepreneur living in [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], Dindoo owned a small mechanic's shop. He was also a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] player on his free [[Time/Legends|time]].

Dindoo found a young Rodian infant, apparently abandoned, and chose to take him and raise him as his own son. He named the baby [[Kelko]].

As soon as Kelko was old enough, Dindoo had to make him work as his assistant at the shop, and also as a [[Rycrit/Legends|rycrit]] shepherd. Kelko showed a considerable amount of skill and resourcefulness.

Dindoo was killed during a sabacc game when Kelko was a teenager. Kelko took over Dindoo's shop and managed to create a side business, [[Dindoo Tours]], where he took tourists to see Ryloth's [[Bright Lands]]. Years later, a much richer Kelko bought a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and named it ''[[Dindoo's Glory]]''.
